private static string GetFailureEmailSubject(string failureType)
{
    switch (failureType)
    {
        case "DecryptionFailure":
            return "DIA File Processing | Failed to decrypt DIA file - Error Notification";

        case "D365DataverseSaveFailure":
            return "DIA File Processing | Failed to save decrypted DIA file in D365 Dataverse - Error Notification";

        case "InvalidEncryptedFileFormat":
            return "DIA File Processing | Invalid encrypted DIA file - Error Notification";

        case "MissingDiaFileAfter7AmNzt":
            return "DIA File Processing | Missing encrypted DIA file - Error Notification";

        default:
            return $"DIA File Processing | {failureType} - Error Notification";
    }
}


var failureEmailSubject = GetFailureEmailSubject(failureType);
LogErrorTitle = failureEmailSubject,
ErrorEmailSubject = failureEmailSubject,
